notes: Pr(y_i<=k)=logit^-1(theta_k - mu_i), mu_i = X_mu[i,] beta_mu, location intercept dropped for identifiability against free cutpoints (R/family.R:302-311). Unit test recovers the x-slope and cutpoints within tolerance and checks confint() returns a finite Wald interval (conf.status="wald"), so an interval mechanism exists and is exercised; no coverage-simulation grid was ever completed (inst/sim/run/sim_run_ordinal_fixed_effect_smoke.R defaults to n_rep=2L smoke only; no docs/dev-log/simulation-artifacts/*ordinal* directory exists), so this is not inference_ready.

notes: Arc 2a: ordinary mu random intercept (1|id) via ML-Laplace. DG2 sentinel (test-arc2a-mu-random-intercept.R / test-tweedie-location-scale.R): convergence=0, pdHess=TRUE, sd estimate within 0.30 of truth, BLUP vs true-effect correlation >0.45 (>0.40 ordinal), profile_targets() profile_ready=TRUE for sd:mu:(1|id), and check_drm() mu_random_effect_replication=ok. Intercept-only; random slopes, sigma/shape/inflation-dpar REs, and labelled covariance blocks are rejected. Small-cluster RE-SD may be biased low under the Laplace approximation (AGHQ/REML remedies planned) and there is no coverage study -> point_fit_recovery, not inference_ready/supported.

O3 (adaptive Gauss-Hermite nodes=25 over the scalar slope RE + Cox-Reid restricted likelihood over the fixed effects incl. cutpoints) interval coverage of the cumulative_logit mu random-slope (0 + x | id) RE-SD. Single-fixture Monte-Carlo coverage (true SD 0.50, n_each=15, N=1200 reps/cell, iid-uncentered), memo-blind D-43 3/3 PROMOTE. NO external ordinal oracle (glmer/glmmTMB cannot fit cumulative_logit); the estimator is INTERNALLY validated (ordinal AGHQ vs brute-force integral 6.4e-9; binomial AGHQ vs glmer nAGQ=25 3.6e-5; nq=1==Laplace exact). Per-M finite-profile coverage: M=40 0.9515 (CI 0.9378-0.9630), M=80 0.9457 (0.9313-0.9578), M=160 0.9596 (0.9467-0.9700), M=320 0.9508 (0.9369-0.9624); every exact-binomial CI overlaps 0.925-0.975 and none over-covers (all ci_hi<=0.97); profile_finite_rate 0.998/0.997/0.989/0.983. Certified floor M=80 (first clean non-exploratory rung, one_sided 2.2%); M=40 clears mechanically but is exploratory/boundary-heavy (15.5% sigma-hat->0 pile-up, most reseed-fragile) and is NOT the reporting floor; M=160/320 confirm with ~0 boundary. Positive control M=320 (0.9508, not ~0/~1) confirms the exp/natural-RE-SD scale contract. inference_ready_with_caveats only, NOT nominal/supported. Mechanism caveat: plain chi^2_1 profile pivot, NOT boundary-corrected (leading candidate if calibration drifts on reseed). Guarantee is CONDITIONAL on the finite-profile + one-sided scoring rule (both-NA computability failures excluded and tallied n_fail 2/4/13/21; one-sided intervals scored on their single computable bound), not an unconditional two-sided guarantee. Directional counts underpowered, diagnostic only (mild large-M miss-from-below = Cox-Reid over-correction). Firewall: covers interval coverage only; point rel-bias (~0 throughout) earns no coverage credit. Excludes other M/SD/n_each/K/fixtures, mu-intercept RE, sigma-side RE, other non-Gaussian families, and the joint-Laplace O2 path (does NOT reach nominal for ordinal).
Double-blocked, as the ordinary_re_intercept/REML row above.
